responses.title: Application Responses
responses.q1: Why are you interested in this position?
responses.a1: I have 3 years of experience in electrical work and am passionate about maintaining electrical systems.
responses.q2: Are you available to work night shifts?
responses.a2: Yes, I am flexible with my schedule and can work night shifts.
responses.q3: Do you have your own tools?
responses.a3: Yes, I have a complete set of electrical tools and safety equipment.
